title: Update text changes to board titles and status labels in workflows automatically
excerpt: Changes made to board titles and/or status labels are not automatically reflected in workflows. The manual process for updating these changes in workflow can be quite tedious. It would be great if these changes were auto…

posts.author: Dorenkampc (Cari Dorenkamp)
posts.cookedHtml: Changes made to board titles and/or status labels are not automatically reflected in workflows. The manual process for updating these changes in workflow can be quite tedious. It would be great if these changes were automatically updated in workflows as they do in automations.
